creator: frank@undermydesk.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hellos,

I've had the same experience with my brand new and shiny
amd64 equipmnent...:

Mainboard -> ASUS M2N-E (nforce 570 - *no* SLI)
RAM       -> DDR2 800 CL5 made by MDT (1.8V ... 2x512)
CPU       -> AMD64 4200+ AM2 EE
GPU       -> ASUS Top Silent 7600GS
HD        -> 2x SATA2 Seagate 160GB drives

... it won't boot the official 6.1 REL (hangs after detecting 1st
drive - see screenshots).

https://www.undermydesk.org/pics/amd64_101873-0.jpg
https://www.undermydesk.org/pics/amd64_101873-1.jpg

but booting/installing from:

  7.0-CURRENT-200608-amd64-disc1.iso

fixed this issue for me.


HTH,

Frank Reppin

- --

mekkerblaat
